title: Ghoti swarm task spec (N+6.27A)
description: Input task spec read by 03_scripts/swarm_launcher/ghoti_swarm_launcher.py. The launcher parses this, validates scope, assigns roles, detects file-ownership overlap, and emits a DRY-RUN plan. The launcher never executes anything described here.

scope.description: Repo-relative path prefixes the tasks may touch. Files outside these are scope violations. No absolute paths, no drive letters, no '..'.

max_parallel.description: Rolling-pool bound: at most this many tasks per wave.

agent.description: Optional explicit agent id; defaults to the role's agent.

files.description: Repo-relative paths this task owns. One owner per path across all tasks.

depends_on.description: Task ids that must complete first; drives the wave order.
